sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n44278" key="eu)ko/mhs" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">εὐκόμης</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ὁ</gen><foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">, (κόμἠ</foreign> <sense id="n44278.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <xr opt="n" TEIform="xr"> <lbl opt="n" TEIform="lbl">=</lbl> <ref targOrder="U" lang="greek" TEIform="ref">εὔκομος</ref></xr>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0542.tlg001:2:2" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Poll.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">2.2</biblScope> </bibl>], <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0542.tlg001:5:83" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">5.83</biblScope></bibl>, <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Max.</author> </bibl> Tyr.<bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg1487.tlg001:3:8" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">3.8</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
